title: JUNIOR SOFTWARE DEVELOPER
description:
Education:

Grade 12
Bachelors degree in Computer Engineering, Software Engineering, Computer Science or and equivalent degree from a recognised tertiary institution

Experience:

Programming experience in any of the following: C++, Python, JavaScript, SQL, Visual Basic
Net and business objects would be advantageous
Interest in Embedded Platform Development, Single Board Computers, Microcontrollers, Firmware Development, circuit boards and setting up electronic circuitry
Exposure to ERP systems in a stock driven environment would be beneficial

Key Responsibilities:

Develop business improvement software and electronics projects that increase the Company’s operational leverage. This meaning technology projects that help increase sales and/or decrease costs
Develop, modify, and maintain SQL Views, stored procedures, and data base triggers
Develop, modify, and maintain C++, Python, JavaScript and Visual Basic code
Set up and maintain embedded platforms and microcontroller circuit boards
Develop, control, and maintain business workflow utilising Laserfiche electronic document management systems and process automation
Develop, control, and maintain the Laserfiche repositories.
Develop, modify, maintain, and optimize SSRS reports
Assist with troubleshooting, software, and operating system issues as and when required
Test and document software

title: Junior Embedded Software Developer
description:
Electronic Embedded Design EngineerJohannesburg EastOur client is looking for a junior embedded software developer to join their team and work on firmware for real-world power electronics products, including power inverters, batteries, and rectifiers. The role involves developing efficient, reliable low-level software in C/C++ that runs close to the hardware, interfaces with sensors and actuators, communicates with other devices, and supports diagnostics and field reliability.Qualification Required:

Bachelor’s degree in Computer Engineering, Electronic Engineering, or Electrical Engineering
More than 2 years’ experience

Responsibilities:

Git (daily use), SSH (remote access/auth), Docker (basic usage for dev/test environments)
Linux terminal basics (shell usage, logs, processes, file permissions)
Networking fundamentals (IP addressing, ports, basic troubleshooting)
API design fundamentals (how devices/services expose data and commands; clear interface definitions)
Automated testing practices (unit + integration; exposure to end-to-end testing is a plus)
Embedded C and C++

Apply via www.edrecruiters.co.za or submit your CV to cv@edrecruiters.co.za. Please refer to Reference number: 3913.Companies may expire positions at their discretion.ONLY SA CITIZENS NEED TO APPLY (No permanent residents or non-SA)

title: Junior Application Software Developer
description:
Junior Application Software DeveloperKempton ParkOur client is hiring a junior embedded software developer to help expand and maintain firmware running on real-world power electronics products (power inverters, batteries, rectifiers).The role focuses on building reliable, efficient low-level software in C/C++ that runs close to the hardware, interfaces with sensors/actuators, communicates with other devices, and supports diagnostics and field reliability. Typical problems include predictable timing behavior, working within limited memory/CPU, investigating bugs that can involve both hardware and software, and improving maintainability across product variants.Qualification:

Bachelor’s degree in Computer Engineering, Electronic Engineering, or Electrical Engineering
1–2 years experience

Responsibilities:

Git (daily use), SSH (remote access/auth), Docker (basic usage for dev/test environments)
Linux terminal basics (shell usage, logs, processes, file permissions)
Networking fundamentals (IP addressing, ports, basic troubleshooting)
API design fundamentals (how devices/services expose data and commands; clear interface definitions)
Automated testing practices (unit + integration; exposure to end-to-end testing is a plus)
Embedded C and C++

Please apply via our website: www.edrecruiters.co.za or alternatively submit your cv to cv@edrecruiters.co.za - Reference Pta003902Companies may expire jobs at their discretion.ONLY SA CITIZENS APPLY
